nodes.text: You've scanned my identification. Is there something that needs clarifying?

responses.text: I have a question about the prescriber.
I need to verify your date of birth.
I notice there's no prior fill history at any location.

nodes.text: What would you like to know?

responses.text: Dr. Manders' NPI lists him as a dentist.
Is this the first time you've seen this doctor?

nodes.text: He does have a dental practice, yes. But he has treated my knee for several years. I suppose he operates in more than one capacity.

responses.text: A dentist isn't within scope to prescribe for chronic orthopedic pain.

nodes.text: I wasn't aware that was a concern. He has always been very thorough.
No, I've seen him many times. He knows my history very well.

responses.text: There's no fill history on file for this medication.

nodes.text: I've always used the chain pharmacy across town. They would have the records, not this location.

responses.text: We can request a transfer. That would take some time.
That matches. I still need to verify the prescriber information.

nodes.text: I understand. I'm happy to wait.
